generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental mapping and object detection LiDAR sensor (Hokuyo UST-10LX) providing point cloud data streams for perception tasks."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera providing RGB-D images for visual perception and object tracking with 640x480 resolution at 30fps."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated vehicle state sensors measuring speed, steering angle, and other kinematic parameters for ego vehicle state estimation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of raw LiDAR point cloud data (3D environmental mapping) from Hokuyo UST-10LX to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of depth camera images (RGB-D) from Intel Deepsense D435i to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of vehicle state telemetry (speed, steering angle) from onboard sensors to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Event-driven transmission of processed object tracks (size, position, velocity) from Point Cloud Clustering FE to Digital Twin Entity via Wi-Fi UDP."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringFE
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) from Physical Twin Entity to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering model implemented in MATLAB/Simulink for object detection and segmentation from raw LiDAR data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringAlgorithm
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object state estimation model implemented in MATLAB/Simulink for tracking detected objects with velocity prediction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterAlgorithm
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Performance Class I compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic implemented in C++/ROS2 for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw unprocessed point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR containing 3D environmental mapping information."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth images from Intel Deepsense D435i camera containing RGB-D information for visual perception."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw vehicle telemetry data including speed, steering angle, and other kinematic parameters."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks containing size, position, velocity, and trajectory information for detected objects."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed ego vehicle state data including current speed and steering angle for ACC regulation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Predicted driving path data generated by ACC control model for visualization and path planning."
]

instance TimeSeriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series reports containing object tracks and vehicle state data for post-analysis."
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) providing inter-process communication, node lifecycle management, and distributed system coordination."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectingFE, DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, ControllingFE, VisualizationFE, ReportingFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer providing real-time processing capabilities for both Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DBSCANClusteringAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN (Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise) algorithm for point cloud segmentation and object detection."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringFE
]

instance KalmanFilterAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter algorithm for state estimation and object tracking with velocity prediction."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringFE
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for storing and managing time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingFE
]

instance WiFiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network providing UDP/TCP communication protocol for inter-entity data transmission between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service providing real-time display of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, PathVisualizationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control service implementing ISO 15622 Performance Class I logic for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service enabling enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking commands."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation service creating human-readable time-series reports for post-processing and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization insight of ego vehicle state including current speed and steering angle."
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization insight of detected objects including size, position, and velocity tracks."
]

instance PathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization insight of projected driving path based on ACC control logic."
]

instance TimeSeriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-analysis insight providing structured time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state data."
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic lead vehicle detection and speed regulation action following ISO 15622 Performance Class I standards."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable command for Adaptive Cruise Control functionality."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired speed parameter for ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command for immediate vehicle deceleration."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller interfacing with vehicle motor for speed regulation commands from Digital Twin Entity."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator receiving voltage commands from Digital Twin Entity for directional control of autonomous vehicle."
]

// C1: Functional Entities (ROS2 Packages)
instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package responsible for collecting raw sensor data streams (LiDAR, depth camera, vehicle telemetry) from Physical Twin Entity."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package standardizing data exchange across entities with serialization and unit conversion for interoperability."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance PointCloudClusteringFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter tracking for object detection and state estimation from raw sensor data."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringAlgorithm, KalmanFilterAlgorithm
]

instance ControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package implementing ISO 15622 compliant ACC logic for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package providing 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path using ROS2 and MATLAB/Simulink rendering."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 package generating time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state data for post-analysis storage in SQL database."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationService
]

// C12: Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano responsible for sensor data processing and actuation commands."
    base:contains DataCollectingFE, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServoActuator
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano or cloud server implementing ACC logic and data management."
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, ControllingFE, VisualizationFE, ReportingFE
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity hosted on remote workstation providing 3D visualization UI and remote control panel for ACC management."
    base:contains VisualizationFE, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin to the physical twin include:
  - **Desired speed commands** generated by the **Controlling FE** (ACC logic) sent to the **Actuation FE** for conversion into motor voltage commands.
  - **Emergency braking commands** and **ACC enable/disable signals** transmitted via the **Control Panel UI** to the **Actuation FE**, which interfaces with the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and steering servo.
  - **Actuation signals** are transmitted over Wi-Fi to the PT's **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**, which executes the commands on the vehicle's actuators with **<100 ms end-to-end latency** (per **3GPP TS 22.185** requirements)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with the following time-scale characteristics:
  - **Sensor acquisition rates**: LiDAR and camera sensors operate at **10–30 Hz** for object detection and tracking, while **vehicle state sensors** (speed/steering) update at **higher frequencies** (unspecified but implied to be ≥10 Hz).
  - **Control loop rate**: The **ACC control loop** executes at **10 Hz** (derived from ISO 15622 performance class I requirements for 1/10-scale vehicles).
  - **Latency synchronization**: The system enforces **100 ms clock synchronization** (via hardware constraints) and **100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185) to ensure temporal alignment between PT and DT operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **distributed, entity-based system** with the following orchestration:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on the PT's Jetson Orin Nano, responsible for **sensor data acquisition**, **pre-processing**, and **actuation command execution**. Includes **Data Pre-Processing FE**, **Actuation FE**, and **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosted on a separate Jetson Orin Nano or cloud server, responsible for **ACC logic**, **data collection**, **reporting**, and **data storage**. Includes **Controlling FE**, **Data Collecting FE**, **Reporting FE**, and **Presentation FE**.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted on a remote workstation, providing **3D Visualization UI** and **Control Panel** for remote management. Implements **User Interface FE** split into visualization and control subcomponents.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless data exchange between entities via serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment. Communication between entities occurs over **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** with **<100 ms latency**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across **design, development, and operational phases** of the automotive system lifecycle:
  - **As-designed**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** during the ACC system’s development phase, validating compliance with **ISO 15622** and enabling remote testing.
  - **As-manufactured**: Leveraged for **post-deployment monitoring** of the 1/10-scale PT’s performance, including real-time diagnostics and troubleshooting.
  - **As-operated**: Supports **runtime optimization** (e.g., fuel economy adjustments via ACC) and **predictive maintenance** (though not explicitly implemented in this case study, it is referenced as a broader DT use case in automotive).
  The DT serves as a **digital thread** for the PT, enabling continuous data flow from design to operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Hardware clocks synchronized to **±100 ms** and **100 ms end-to-end latency** (3GPP TS 22.185) for temporal consistency.
  - **Sensor calibration**: LiDAR/depth camera data processed via **DBSCAN + Kalman filter** to mitigate noise in object tracking.
  - **Control validation**: ACC logic compliant with **ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)**, ensuring safe following distances.
  - **Data integrity**: **SQL database** stores object tracks and vehicle state for post-hoc validation. However, the document does not specify:
    - Ground truth validation methods (e.g., comparing object tracks against manual annotations).
    - Uncertainty quantification (e.g., sensor noise modeling, Kalman filter covariance analysis).
    - Formal verification of ACC logic beyond ISO 15622 compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication, with **ROS2 topics** for intra-entity messaging.
  - **Data Serialization**: **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment for all data streams (e.g., LiDAR point clouds, vehicle telemetry, ACC commands).
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency **≤100 ms** (per **3GPP TS 22.185**) enforced via hardware synchronization and optimized Wi-Fi configurations.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Hardware clocks synchronized to **±100 ms accuracy** using ROS2's built-in time synchronization mechanisms or external NTP servers if available."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** embedded in the PT, running ROS2 and application modules (Python/C++/MATLAB/Simulink).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on a **separate Jetson Orin Nano** or cloud server (e.g., AWS/Google Cloud) for offloading compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic). Uses **ROS2** for local execution and **Wi-Fi** for PT communication.
  - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **remote workstation** running a **3D visualization UI** (e.g., ROS2 + MATLAB/Simulink) and **Control Panel** for remote management. The UI connects to the Digital Twin Entity via Wi-Fi.
  - **Data Storage**: **SQL database** hosted on the Digital Twin Entity or a cloud server for storing time-series reports and processed data."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **ROS2-based simulation tools**: While not explicitly implemented, the architecture supports integration with **Gazebo** or other ROS2-compatible simulators for offline testing.
  - **Cloud platforms**: The Digital Twin Entity could theoretically offload computation to **AWS/Google Cloud** (though not implemented in this case study; referenced as a general DT capability).
  - **Industrial protocols**: The **Data Translation FE** could interface with **OPC UA (IEC 62541)** for enterprise integration, though this is not deployed in the current system.
  Specific integrations are not detailed in the document beyond **ROS2 middleware** and **Wi-Fi networking**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2: Reference Architecture)** serves as the foundational architecture, with adaptations for automotive use (e.g., introduction of **Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **ISO 15622**: **Road Vehicles – Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) Systems** for defining ACC logic and performance requirements (Performance Class I).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Service Requirements for V2V Communication** for latency constraints (<100 ms end-to-end).
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Mentioned as a potential candidate for data translation in ISO 23247, though not explicitly implemented in this case study.
  - **ROS2**: **Robot Operating System 2** for middleware and distributed system coordination (not a standard but widely adopted in robotics and automotive)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin incorporates the following security and safety measures:
  - **Safety**:
    - **Human-in-the-Loop (HITL)**: Classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (David & Bork taxonomy), ensuring operator oversight for critical commands (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **Latency constraints**: **100 ms end-to-end delay** (3GPP TS 22.185) and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** mitigate timing-related failures in distributed control.
    - **ISO 15622 compliance**: ACC logic adheres to safety-critical standards for adaptive cruise control.
  - **Security**:
    - **No explicit security protocols**: The document does not mention encryption (e.g., TLS/SSL), authentication, or access control. Assumes a **trusted local network** for communication.
    - **Trusted execution**: The PT and Digital Twin Entity operate in a controlled environment with no mention of adversarial threats or tampering.
    - **Data isolation**: While the **SQL database** stores sensitive data, no privacy-preserving mechanisms (e.g., anonymization, role-based access) are described."
]
